category_sources: source_facts.description says Magnetic Scrolls Interpreter; official homepage says dMagnetic is an interpreter for Magnetic Scrolls classic text adventures.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and download section use dMagnetic; source_facts.name is dmagnetic.
docs_sources: Official dMagnetic homepage links the PDF documentation and documents downloads, supported games, input formats, rendering modes, and install commands.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository identified; official homepage provides source tarball download only, not a repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable; official homepage lists Magnetic Scrolls titles, terminal rendering modes, input formats, and portability.
